Referrals boost your waitlist rank now, and Arcus has said referrers can earn up to 10% of a referred trader’s fees for life once the referral program is fully active. Tips for Maximizing Your Arcus Position Prioritize dYdX History : If you traded, staked, or otherwise participated with dYdX in the past, connecting that v4 address is one of the more concrete waitlist boosts available right now. Combine Perps Volume Across Venues : Waitlist rank counts volume from dYdX v3, Hyperliquid, and Lighter, so existing activity on any of those platforms carries over. Stay Active on Spot : With 0% fees on stock trades, there’s no cost barrier to keeping your account active while perps access rolls out. Frequently Asked Questions Is the Arcus Token Confirmed? Yes. dYdX founder Antonio Juliano confirmed Arcus will launch its own token, separate from DYDX. Allocation size, distribution method, and a launch date have not been announced yet. Do I Need to Trade to Improve My Waitlist Position? Trading isn’t required to join the waitlist, but prior perps volume on dYdX, Hyperliquid, or Lighter and RWA volume through HIP

3, Cash, or TradeXYZ both factor into your rank. Is Arcus Free to Use? Spot trading on tokenized stocks is 0% fee. Perps fees haven’t been published yet since the product is still in closed beta. Conclusion Arcus combines dYdX’s trading infrastructure with Robinhood Crypto’s tokenized stock lineup, giving users a working spot market today and a confirmed token on the way for a perps waitlist that rewards early, verifiable activity. Trading spot stocks, joining the perps waitlist, and linking a dYdX v4 address cost nothing beyond deposited capital and cover the main actions available today. airdrops.about: What is Arcus? Arcus is a decentralized exchange built by the dYdX Labs team in partnership with Robinhood Crypto. It runs on Robinhood Chain and lets users trade more than 95 tokenized stock tokens around the clock with zero fees on spot trades. Beyond spot, Arcus is rolling out perpetual futures covering equities, crypto, commodities, and indices. The platform is self-custodial, and tokenized stocks can be used as collateral for perps. Arcus launched spot trading in beta on July 1, 2026, with perps still in a closed beta and waitlist phase.

airdrops.about: What is SolPump? SolPump is a premier on-chain Solana betting platform that specializes in crash games and betting opportunities using SOL tokens. The platform operates directly on the Solana blockchain, allowing users to connect their personal wallets and place bets without transferring funds to separate gaming accounts. This approach ensures that users maintain full control over their assets while participating in gaming activities. The platform features a Provably Fair system that uses cryptography and third-party input to generate random values, allowing players to verify game outcomes and ensure legitimate operations. SolPump integrates social features through its active chat community, where players can interact, share strategies, and participate in hourly airdrop distributions.

airdrops.about: What is Ondo Perps? Ondo Perps is a perpetual futures trading platform built by the team behind Ondo Finance, offering 24/7 trading on tokenized U.S. equities, ETFs, and commodities. Users can take long or short positions on assets like NVDA, TSLA, AAPL, gold, silver, and oil with up to 20x leverage. The platform launched in early access in 2025 and is available to users outside the United States and other restricted jurisdictions. The platform’s main differentiator is planned support for tokenized securities as collateral. Existing RWA perps venues force traders to post stablecoins, locking up capital twice when they already hold the underlying asset. Ondo Finance previously raised a $4M seed round in 2021; a $20M Series A in 2022 led by Founders Fund and Pantera Capital, with backing from Coinbase Ventures, Tiger Global, and Wintermute and $22M in May 2022.

airdrops.about: What is Hypertrade? Hypertrade is a DEX aggregator built specifically for the Hyperliquid ecosystem, designed to help users find the best rates when swapping crypto across both HyperCore and HyperEVM. The platform searches across multiple decentralized exchanges including Hyperliquid Spot, Hyperswap, and Prjx to identify the most favorable swap rates. When executing trades, Hypertrade automatically splits orders across different exchanges if needed to maximize output and minimize slippage. The platform uses Invisium Swap Simulations to simulate complex swap paths before execution, ensuring 100% accurate swap quotes for users.

airdrops.about: What is AFX? AFX is a sovereign Layer 1 blockchain built specifically for decentralized perpetuals trading. Instead of deploying a perp DEX on an existing chain, the team built its own execution layer with sub-100ms finality, zero gas fees, and a fully on-chain central limit order book. The result feels closer to a centralized exchange than a typical DeFi protocol, while matching and settlement stay verifiable on-chain. AFX raised no VC or private funding. The team skipped investor rounds entirely in favor of a community-first launch, which has direct consequences for how the future token gets distributed.

steps: details using a disclosure key Repeating these daily earns credits and counts toward your weekly streak. Step 6: Maintain a Weekly Streak Stay active every ISO week to build a streak multiplier, worth up to 1.5x on testnet quest rewards. Missing a week resets the multiplier. Step 7: Refer Friends Share your personal referral link from the dashboard. Each fully verified referral (wallet plus Discord, Telegram, and X all linked) earns 10 credits, with extra credits at referral milestones. Step 8: Complete Off
Chain Quests The dashboard also lists off
chain tasks like follows, shares, quizzes, and submissions. These stack on top of your on

chain and referral credits. Step 9: Track Your Progress Check the Community dashboard regularly to monitor your credits, quest completion, streak status, and referral count ahead of the snapshot. Tips for Maximizing Your ORB Allocation Do all four on

chain quests daily, not just once. Shield, transfer, unshield, and disclosure quests are repeatable, and skipping days costs you both credits and streak progress. Verify all three socials early. The 20

credit signup bonus and every future referral depend on having wallet, Discord, Telegram, and X all linked. Don’t let your streak lapse. The multiplier applies to testnet quest credits specifically, so a broken streak close to the snapshot costs more than one earlier in the season. Watch for the snapshot date. It’s fixed at 14 days before mainnet, not TGE itself, so activity after the snapshot won’t count even if it happens before ORB launches. Frequently Asked Questions When is the Orbinum Network TGE? Orbinum’s token generation event is planned for Q4 2026, sometime between October and December, alongside mainnet launch. An exact date hasn’t been announced. Is the Orbinum Network airdrop free to join? Yes. Participation only requires free testnet tokens from the faucet, plus completing quests, streaks, and referrals. No real funds or token purchases are involved. How do ORB Credits convert into tokens? ORB Credits earned during Season 1 convert proportionally into a share of the 20,000,000 ORB allocation. A snapshot taken exactly 14 days before mainnet locks in each user’s credit total. What happens if I miss part of Season 1? Only credits earned before the snapshot, taken 14 days before mainnet, count toward the airdrop. There’s no way to retroactively earn credits for weeks you missed, so consistent activity matters more than a late push. Will there be an airdrop after Season 1? Orbinum hasn’t announced further airdrop seasons beyond the current Genesis Community allocation. Any future distributions would depend on decisions made after mainnet launch. Conclusion Orbinum Network’s Genesis Community season rewards testnet activity, referrals, and consistent engagement with a direct share of 20,000,000 ORB at TGE, currently expected sometime in Q4 2026. Credits convert proportionally and unlock in full at distribution, with the snapshot landing 14 days before mainnet. A meaningful allocation comes down to running the daily shield, transfer, unshield, and disclosure quests, keeping your streak alive, and verifying your socials for the referral bonus. None of it costs real money, just testnet tokens from the faucet and consistent weekly activity. airdrops.about: What is Orbinum Network? Orbinum Network is a privacy-focused Layer 1 blockchain built on Substrate with EVM compatibility through Frontier. The chain centers on ZK shielded pools, letting users shield, transfer, and unshield assets while keeping the sender, recipient, and amount hidden by default. Orbinum’s public testnet went live on July 16, 2026, matching its Q3 2026 roadmap target. Mainnet and the ORB token generation event are planned for Q4 2026, sometime between October and December. No funding or backer information has been disclosed publicly.

Rewards go to market makers who post resting limit orders, distributed daily at midnight UTC.
airdrops.about: What is Polymarket? Polymarket is the world’s largest decentralized prediction market, built on the Polygon network. Users buy and sell shares on the outcome of real-world events: elections, sports, crypto prices, geopolitics; with prices reflecting crowd-sourced probabilities. There is no house; trades are peer-to-peer, and smart contracts handle settlement automatically in USDC. The platform became a popular source for real-time outcome probability during the 2024 U.S. elections, processing over $3.6 billion in election-related activity. Polymarket raised $70 million in early fundraising from Founders Fund, General Catalyst, Polychain Capital, Dragonfly Capital, and Vitalik Buterin. Intercontinental Exchange, the parent company of the NYSE, invested $2 billion at a $9 billion valuation in October 2025, consolidating Polymarket’s dominance in the prediction market with over 95% market volume. In late 2025, Polymarket began a limited U.S. relaunch after acquiring QCX, a CFTC-registered

airdrops.about: What Is TrueNorth? TrueNorth is an agentic brokerage giving retail traders their own desk of AI trading agents modeled on professional traders. The platform handles research, signals, trade setup, and execution in one place, instead of leaving users to piece together charts, news, and on-chain data themselves. TrueNorth raised $3 million in a pre-seed round in December 2025, led by CyberFund with Delphi Labs, GSR, SNZ, and Ocular VC also participating. Angel backers include Bryan Pellegrino of LayerZero and Jordi Alexander of Selini Capital.

airdrops.tge_date: . Points accumulate through mainnet trading, referrals, waitlist activity, X account linking, and holding specific Hyperliquid-native NFTs
steps: . Refer early. Points programs typically reward users who bring in early adopters more than late

funnel referrals. Check badge status before buying NFTs. Boosts for qualifying collections are retroactive. Don’t buy NFTs just for badges unless you already wanted them. Track your rank weekly. Points update on a weekly cycle. Checking the points page regularly lets you adjust activity before any cutoff windows. Frequently Asked Questions Does Liquidiction Have a Token? No. As of May 2026, Liquidiction has not announced a token or confirmed an airdrop. The live points and badge system are building blocks, but no official token announcement has been made. Is It Free to Participate? Linking your X account, minting a referral code, and joining the Telegram are all free. Trading on mainnet requires depositing USDC into your Hyperliquid account, so the core activity does involve real capital. How Do Points Convert to a Token Allocation? No conversion formula has been disclosed. Points determine your tier and leaderboard rank, which typically form the basis of allocation in points

based programs, but the specifics are unconfirmed. Which NFTs Qualify for Badge Points? Qualifying collections are Hypurr, HypioHL, TinyHypercats, PiPonHL, Whal3s, Atlanteans, and Eternal Whal3s. Badge boosts for these collections are applied retroactively, so check your dashboard to confirm your status. Will Testnet Activity Count? Yes. Testnet scores are already pre
loaded into the mainnet points system. Your existing balance and badges from testnet are reflected on the dashboard now. Conclusion Liquidiction is the main interface for Hyperliquid’s HIP

4 prediction markets, with a live points program that tracks trading, referrals, NFT holdings, and social activity. No token has been confirmed, but the tier and badge infrastructure mirrors how similar campaigns have run ahead of a launch. Mainnet trading volume and early referrals are the highest

leverage activities. If you hold any qualifying NFT collections, your badge boosts are likely already applied. airdrops.about: What is Liquidiction? Liquidiction is a frontend aggregator for Hyperliquid’s HIP-4 prediction markets. It pulls together binary prediction markets, where users trade on price outcomes and other events, into one interface with live odds, real-time order books, leaderboards, and activity tracking across all active markets. The platform runs on Hyperliquid , a high-performance L1 built for on-chain trading. HIP-4 is Hyperliquid’s native prediction market standard; Liquidiction is the main frontend for discovering and trading those markets. No external funding has been publicly disclosed.

It lets users run delta-neutral market-making strategies on Hyperliquid without writing Python scripts, managing servers, or handling signing and nonces themselves. Tradoor0 has not disclosed any funding rounds or backers, and the product is still explicitly in beta. Note that Tradoor0 is unrelated to the TRADOOR token traded on other chains; the two are separate projects that happen to share a similar name.

airdrops.about: What is Robinhood Chain? Robinhood Chain is a permissionless Layer 2 blockchain built on Arbitrum , designed specifically for financial services and tokenized real-world assets. The platform enables native issuance, access, and transfer of tokenized assets without intermediaries, positioning itself as the infrastructure layer for Robinhood’s onchain financial services. With 100ms block times and secured by Ethereum, the chain provides developers with high-throughput infrastructure to build financial applications. The project is backed by Robinhood Markets, which has raised approximately $5.77 billion across multiple funding rounds from notable investors including Sequoia Capital, Andreessen Horowitz (a16z), Ribbit Capital, Index Ventures, and DST Global. Robinhood Chain’s testnet launched on February 11, 2026, with mainnet deployment anticipated in the coming months. The platform has committed $1 million to the 2026 Arbitrum Open House program to support developer activity on its testn

airdrops.about: What Is Hyperliquid? Hyperliquid is a purpose-built Layer 1 blockchain for high-performance DeFi. At its core is the Hyperliquid DEX: a fully on-chain orderbook perpetuals exchange processing roughly 200,000 orders per second with ~0.2s median latency — no off-chain sequencer, zero gas fees. The platform supports perpetual futures, spot trading, and a native token standard with permissionless liquidity provision. The HYPE token powers the entire ecosystem: staking, governance, fee payments, and token burns. The protocol burns HYPE regularly using a portion of generated revenue — a governance vote in early 2026 approved burning approximately $1 billion worth of HYPE, adding deflationary pressure on top of the staking yield. Since its alpha launch in 2023, Hyperliquid has crossed $100 billion in cumulative trading volume and now commands roughly 60% of the total perpetual DEX market.

The platform pulls charts, execution, onchain data, portfolio management, and capital tools into one interface, replacing the 5–8 disconnected applications that most active Solana traders currently juggle. airdrops.about: What is Hylo? Hylo is a DeFi protocol on Solana that provides a high-yield stablecoin and leveraged SOL exposure that is resistant to liquidation. Its flagship product, xSOL, differs from most leverage protocols in that it allows users to increase their exposure to SOL prices without incurring funding costs or liquidation risk. In addition to yield-bearing positions, the stablecoin hyUSD and its staked variant sHYUSD offer XP rewards. Since its mid-2025 launch on the Solana mainnet, the protocol has grown to include ecosystem integrations with protocols such as Kamino, Exponent, and RateX. Investors Robot Ventures, Colosseum, and Solana Ventures contributed $1.5 million to Hylo.

airdrops.tge_date: . The program runs through a pre-registration loyalty phase, followed by Season 1 on Solana and BNB Chain
steps: take time to register. Latest Update: SHIFT Season 1 Finale XP Booster The SHIFT Season 1 Finale XP Booster is live through July 31, 23:59 UTC, multiplying all trading XP earned before the season closes. Boosted XP counts toward leaderboard position for the rest of Season 1. 2× Trading XP: now through July 28 3× Trading XP: final 72 hours, July 29–31 Trade to Earn Boosted XP Every trade placed through the SHIFT airdrop portal earns multiplied XP during the booster window. Trade before the July 31 deadline to improve your leaderboard position before Season 1 ends. Tips for Maximizing $SHFT Allocation Finish every quest before revealing your badge : Badge rarity locks in permanently. A Legendary multiplier applies to all future points, so the time spent grinding pre
registration tasks pays off heavily. Hold during low
volume periods : Holding tasks accrue points passively. When you’re not actively trading, keeping a position open still adds to your score. Refer active users, not just sign
ups : Referral points scale with downstream activity. One referred trader can outweigh a dozen passive sign

ups, so target users likely to actually use the platform. Frequently Asked Questions When will the SHIFT TGE happen? The SHIFT team has not announced a specific TGE date. The leveraged equity token series launches on Solana and BNB Chain in the coming weeks, with the $SHFT token generation event expected once Season 1 of the points program wraps up. Is the SHIFT airdrop free to participate in? Pre

registration and badge claiming are free. Earning points through trading and holding leveraged SHIFT tokens requires capital on Solana or BNB Chain, but the loyalty program itself costs nothing beyond gas. How do points convert to $SHFT at TGE? Points convert based on your final tally multiplied by your locked badge rarity multiplier. The exact ratio depends on total points distributed across all participants and the final airdrop allocation, neither of which has been announced. What happens if I reveal my badge too early? Badge rarity locks the moment you reveal. Skip optional quests before revealing and you’re capped at a lower multiplier permanently. Complete every available task in the pre
registration phase before triggering the reveal. Will there be more SHIFT airdrops after Season 1? The team has indicated multiple seasons, with Season 1 starting after pre
registration closes. Future seasons will likely use on
chain activity (trade volume, position duration, liquidity provision) as the main points input. Can I farm SHIFT without trading leveraged tokens? Yes. Pre

registration quests, social tasks, badge reveals, and referrals all generate points without requiring trading capital. Trading and holding boost allocation but are not required to qualify. Conclusion Trading and holding a Series position earns XP daily and builds your multiplier. You can stack additional XP through Badges, which range from common to legendary with rarer ones paying out more, and through Tasks, which are simple actions that add XP straight to your balance. XP converts to $SHFT once the season ends. TGE timing and vesting details remain unconfirmed, with allocation expected to skew toward early participants and high
airdrops.about: What is SHIFT? SHIFT is a real-world asset protocol that issues leveraged and inverse tokenized stocks, ETFs, and ETNs as SPL tokens on Solana . The platform offers 2x and 3x long and short exposure to traditional equity markets through composable on-chain tokens, with mirror products planned for BNB Chain. Every position is 1:1 backed by real assets custodied at tier-1 banks, and reserves are verified through Chainlink Proof of Reserve. The pitch is leveraged equity exposure without liquidation risk. Token NAV represents the worst-case loss, so positions cannot be force-closed against the holder. SHIFT tokens are permissionless and self-custodial. They trade 24/7 on DEXs like Jupiter and Orca and work as DeFi collateral. SHIFT raised roughly $400,000 in pre-seed funding led by SNZ Holdings, with Chainlink participating as a strategic backer alongside its PoR integration.

The platform is for DeFi users who want to be able to use on-chain assets in traditional markets. People can trade, add liquidity, and use xStocks tokens as collateral in borrowing and lending markets, all without leaving the DeFi interface. Backed.fi, the parent company of xStocks, has raised a total of $9.5M across two funding rounds.

airdrops.about: What is Privacy Pools? Privacy Pools is a compliant privacy protocol on Ethereum built by 0xbow. It lets users deposit assets publicly and withdraw them privately to fresh addresses using zero-knowledge proofs, breaking the on-chain link between deposit and withdrawal. Unlike older mixers, every deposit passes through Association Set Provider (ASP) vetting, so withdrawals carry proof that funds are not connected to illicit activity. Pools for ETH, USDC, and USDT now run on Ethereum, Arbitrum , and OP Mainnet .
airdrops.estimated_cost: s nothing and turns your contribution into public, verifiable proof under your own account

airdrops.about: What is Ducat? Ducat is a credit and stablecoin protocol built directly on Bitcoin Layer 1. It lets BTC holders deposit Bitcoin into non-custodial vaults and borrow UNIT, a dollar-pegged stablecoin issued as a Bitcoin Rune, or USDC converted 1:1 through Circle. Every vault, loan, and liquidation is enforced by Bitcoin Script and settles on the Bitcoin base chain. Ducat has raised $4M in total. That started with a $1.25M pre-seed in August 2024 led by UTXO Management, joined by CMS Holdings, Bitcoin Frontier Fund, Samara Asset Group, Marin Ventures, ReveloIntel, Bitcoin Startup Lab, and Bitflow. A $1.5M public sale to individual investors followed in May 2025.

airdrops.about: What Is 3Jane? 3Jane is a credit-based money market on Ethereum that issues uncollateralized USDC credit lines to crypto users and funds U.S. fintech lenders. Suppliers deposit USDC to mint USD3, a credit-backed stablecoin that pays yield from the protocol’s lending activity, or sUSD3, a levered version with higher returns and higher risk. The protocol raised a $5.2 million seed round in June 2025 led by Paradigm, with Coinbase Ventures, Robot Ventures, Breed VC, and Bodhi Ventures also taking part.

steps: hash. That record is what Doppler support will ask for. Step 7: Watch for the Claim Window Registration is not a claim. Tokens become claimable at TGE, and Doppler has not published a date. Follow the project on X and check our claims page so you catch the window. Frequently Asked Questions When is the Doppler Finance XDP TGE? Doppler has not announced a TGE date. The team confirmed XDP as its governance and utility token in July 2026 but withheld supply, allocation and launch timing. Registration is open now, and claims go live once the token generates. Can I still earn Doppler Points? No. Both DP seasons have closed and points accrual has stopped. Eligibility for the XDP Genesis Airdrop is based on Season 1, Season 2 and other qualifying activity that Doppler has already snapshotted, so new deposits do not add to an allocation. Why do I need a Base address for an XRP Ledger project? XDP deploys on Base and the XRP Ledger, but governance launches on Base first. All Genesis Airdrop allocations are therefore delivered to Base, which is why registration asks for an address on that network rather than an XRPL one. Does registering guarantee an allocation? No. Doppler treats registration as a submission subject to verification. Wallets that fail eligibility checks receive nothing, and an incorrect or unsupported address can void an otherwise valid allocation permanently. Will Doppler Finance run further airdrops after this one? Doppler has not committed to anything beyond the Genesis Airdrop. XDP is described as a coordination layer with incentive programs rolling out in phases, which leaves room for later distributions, though none have been announced. Conclusion The farming phase of Doppler Finance is over. What remains is administrative: connect the XRPL wallet that earned your Doppler Points, submit a Base address you fully control, and keep a record of the confirmation. Allocations unlock in full at TGE, with no vesting attached. airdrops.about: What is Variational? Variational is a decentralized peer-to-peer trading protocol built on Arbitrum that specializes in perpetuals and generalized derivatives. The protocol provides infrastructure for P2P trading, clearing, and settlement, enabling secure bilateral trading of options, futures, perpetuals, and exotic derivatives. Unlike traditional derivatives platforms, Variational eliminates revenue leakage to third-party market makers by redirecting value directly back to users through its unique rewards system. The protocol’s flagship application, Omni, positions itself as “the most rewarding place to trade perps” by offering zero-fee trading while users earn benefits including loss refunds, spread discounts, and platform credits from their normal trading activity. This stands in stark contrast to other exchanges that typically charge 0.05% to 0.6% per trade. Omni aggregates liquidity from centralized exchanges, decentralized exchanges, DeFi protocols, and OTC sources through the Om

airdrops.about: What is GRVT? GRVT is building the world’s first regulated hybrid exchange, set to redefine the future of finance through a secure, compliant, and user-friendly platform. The exchange has already secured $3.3 billion in monthly committed volume from prominent market makers such as Ampersan, IMC, Galaxy Trading, and Flow Traders. At the core of GRVT is the mission to make DeFi invisible. Its user-first decentralized marketplace is designed to be simple, secure, and accessible to everyone. Whether you are new to DeFi or an experienced trader, GRVT’s trustless ecosystem allows anyone to participate without prior expertise. What sets GRVT apart is its position as the first fully licensed DeFi exchange, committed to compliance and regulation to ensure user safety and protection from counterparty risks. Eventually you’ll be able to trade other financial products like money market funds, FX and commodities. The exchange has secured $33.3M in funding from investors like 500 Global, EigenCloud,

airdrops.about: What is Minara AI? Minara AI is an AI-powered financial assistant that aggregates data across crypto, stocks, DeFi, NFTs, and real-world assets. The platform operates through a chat-based interface where users can ask questions, analyze markets, manage portfolios, and execute trades using a built-in custodial wallet. The platform launched its beta on August 14, 2025, and is backed by Circle, the issuer of USDC stablecoin. Minara supports real-time market insights, automated workflows, and one-click trading execution across multiple asset classes. Key features include Trading Copilot for AI-assisted trade analysis, portfolio management tools, and cross-asset market data aggregation.

What it runs instead is a live incentive program on the Markets testnet: Portal Points, which the team has stated will flow into mainnet incentives as the protocol approaches TGE. On top of points, weekly tournaments pay out real USDC prize pools, with reported pools starting around $1,000 and reaching $2,500. Key Parameters: Airdrop Allocation : Not announced Distribution Method : Portal Points earned on testnet, carrying into mainnet incentives TGE Date : Not announced Vesting Schedule : Not announced Every participant starts each competition period with the same balance of GMIC, a resettable testnet currency with no real value. Your PnL, streaks, and leaderboard placement during the period determine your Portal Point bonuses and any share of the USDC prizes. Because everyone starts equal, rankings come down to prediction performance rather than capital.
airdrops.about: What is Linera? Linera is a Layer-1 blockchain protocol designed to deliver Web2-like scalability and low-latency performance to Web3 applications. It addresses the blockspace scarcity problem in traditional blockchains through its microchain architecture, where each user operates on independent, lightweight chains that run concurrently within a shared validator set. These microchains allow for real-time, high-performance decentralized applications with predictable performance and internet-scale scalability. Developed based on academic protocols like FastPay (created by founder Mathieu Baudet and co-authors at Meta’s Novi Research), Linera can confirm account-based operations in a fraction of a second. This makes Web3 interactions as seamless as Web2 applications, supporting use cases like real-time transactions, decentralized identity, and user-owned data for applications such as art provenance or social platform interoperability.

airdrops.about: What is Concrete? Concrete is a full-stack yield infrastructure protocol that works on Ethereum and supports multi-chain vaults on Arbitrum , Berachain, and other chains. The platform makes it easy to make money by using institutional-grade vaults that take care of asset allocation, rebalancing, and compounding. Users only need to deposit once, and the system does the rest. Concrete has raised $17M in total funding, including a Series A led by Hashed and Tribe Capital, and a $9.5M strategic round led by Polychain Capital. Other important investors are YZi Labs (which used to be called Binance Labs) and VanEck. The protocol is now live on the mainnet, and its active vault products have a total value of more than $1 billion.
